description: Your search for the perfect home stops here! One of the best-priced townhomes in Surrey, close to schools, shopping, and transit.This fully renovated 3 bed, 2 bath townhouse in the heart of Newton offers unmatched value in a highly accessible, family-friendly complex. Featuring brand new windows, vinyl siding all paid for by current owners.Modern upgrades throughout, including sleek washrooms, new flooring, and brand new appliances. The open-concept layout and beautiful floor plan make it ideal for investors or first-time buyers.Move-in ready and waiting for you!
